sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐκφέρω

- Transliteration: Ekphero

- Phonetic: ek-fer'-o

- Definition:

1. to carry out, to bear forth

a. the dead for burial

2. to bring i.e. lead out

3. to bring forth, i.e. produce

a. of the earth bearing plants

- Origin: from G1537 and G5342

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G5342; to bear out (literally or figuratively): - bear bring forth carry forth (out).
